  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz to wedde Wiꞥſch
manni zaur to ee-eijamu Weetu/
kas fahnis tahm Wahrtim bija/
eekſch to Preestern twehtecin
Rambaxeem/ kas prett Seeme-
ta-Puffi irr/ un raugi/ abbejaß
Puffee bija weena Weeta prett
Wakara-Puffi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch fazzija us
man: Schi irr ta Weeta; kur
teem Preestereem buhs to No-
feedſibaß-Uppuri un to Grebko-
Uppuri wahrcht/ un kur teem
buhs to Ehdamo-Uppuri zept:
ka tee to ahreja Pagalina ne iß,
nefß/ tohs Landis twehtiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad iswedde Wiꞥſch
mann ahreja Pagalinâ/un wed-
de mann apkahrt eekſch teem
tſchetreem Stuhreem ta Pa-
galinja/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un reds/ iﬀkatra Pagalin-
ja Stuhri bija zitti Pagalmi-
schi/eekſch teem tſchetreem Stuh-
reem ta Pagalinja bija Pagal-
mischi ar kwehpinajaniahm
Weetabm/ tſchetrdefnuts Ohlek-
schu bija tas Garrums/ un triß-
defnuts witann Plattums/ un
tahm paſchahm tſchetrahm
Stuhen-Weetabm bija wee-
nahds Mehre.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un weens Minbris b
wiſsapkahrt/ apkahrt tahm p
schahm tſchetrahm/ un Uggu
Kurri bija leija pee teem Mu
reein apkahrt darriti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Wiꞥſch fazzija us ma
Schee irr ta Namna Uggu
Kurri/ kur teem Sullainceem
Namna buhs to Lauschu u
purus wahriht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XLVII. Nodalla.
Mo ta Uhdens/ kas no ta Deewa Namma
tek: 1. Mo tahm Rohbeschahm tahs fr
tas Semmes: 13. Ka/ un starp ko ta
dałlama: 21.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pehz to wedde Wi
Bunnu atkat pee ta Na
ima Durwin/ un re
tur istezzeja Uhdens no
Sleeksna Appakschas prett R
ta-Puffi/ jo ta Naña Preeſ
Gals bija prett Rihta-Pu
un tas Uhdens notezzeja no ſ
pakſchas/ no ta Namna lab
Puffes/ fahnis to Altart p
Deenas-Widnum.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch iswedde m
us to Widduzi prett tahm E
meła Wahrtim/ un wedde m
apkahrt us to ahreju Zelfu
tahm Wahrtim/ kas Abrapu
us to Widduzi prett Rihta-P
fi/ un redsi/ tas Uhdens iſ
no labbas Puffes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad nu tas Wihrs

weens Mehra-Auklis wtunaſ
ka/ un wiꞥſch mebroja tub
chas Oſektis/ un liſſe ma
zaur to Uhdeni pahreet/ un
"
